targets.rawSql:
SELECT date_trunc('hour',s.time) + (((extract(minute FROM s.time)::int / $TimeRangeGroup) * $TimeRangeGroup)::text || ' minute')::interval as time
      -- , trunc(max_value/100) AS lpsis1_max
      , trunc(MAX(avg_value/100)) AS lpsis1_CPU
      -- extract(hour from date_trunc('hour', TO_TIMESTAMP(floor(extract(epoch from s.time)/3600)*3600)))
   FROM lpsis1.apm_db_os_stat_10min s,ora_db_os_name n
  WHERE s.db_id = n.db_id
    AND s.os_id = n.os_id
    AND n.os_id = 6
    and s.time between date_trunc('month', to_date($__timeFrom(),'YYYY-MM-DDTHH24:MI:SS')) - interval '0 months' and date_trunc('month', to_date($__timeTo(),'YYYY-MM-DDTHH24:MI:SS'))  + interval '1 months' 
group by 1
order by 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour',s.time) + (((extract(minute FROM s.time)::int / $TimeRangeGroup) * $TimeRangeGroup)::text || ' minute')::interval as time
      -- , trunc(max_value/100) AS lpsis1_max
      , trunc(MAX(avg_value/100)) AS lpsis2_CPU
      -- extract(hour from date_trunc('hour', TO_TIMESTAMP(floor(extract(epoch from s.time)/3600)*3600)))
   FROM lpsis2.apm_db_os_stat_10min s,ora_db_os_name n
  WHERE s.db_id = n.db_id
    AND s.os_id = n.os_id
    AND n.os_id = 6
    and s.time between date_trunc('month', to_date($__timeFrom(),'YYYY-MM-DDTHH24:MI:SS')) - interval '0 months' and date_trunc('month', to_date($__timeTo(),'YYYY-MM-DDTHH24:MI:SS'))  + interval '1 months' 
group by 1
order by 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour',a.time) + (((extract(minute FROM a.time)::int / $TimeRangeGroup) * $TimeRangeGroup)::text || ' minute')::interval as time
     , ROUND(MAX(( ROUND(  a.max_value/1024.0 , 1 ) -  ROUND( b.avg_value /1024.0 , 1 ) ) /ROUND(  a.max_value/1024.0 , 1 ) *100.0) , 0 ) AS lpsis1_Mem_Use
   FROM lpsis1.apm_db_os_stat_10min a, lpsis1.apm_db_os_stat_10min b, ora_db_os_name c
  WHERE a.db_id = c.db_id
    AND a.os_id = c.os_id
    and a.partition_key  = b.partition_key
    AND c.os_id = 5
    and a.time between date_trunc('month', to_date($__timeFrom(),'YYYY-MM-DDTHH24:MI:SS')) - interval '0 months' and date_trunc('month', to_date($__timeTo(),'YYYY-MM-DDTHH24:MI:SS')) + interval '1 months' 
    and a.time = b.time
    and a.db_id = b.db_id
    and b.os_id = 4
group by 1
order by 1
;

SELECT date_trunc('hour',a.time) + (((extract(minute FROM a.time)::int / $TimeRangeGroup) * $TimeRangeGroup)::text || ' minute')::interval as time
     , ROUND(MAX(( ROUND(  a.max_value/1024.0 , 1 ) -  ROUND( b.avg_value /1024.0 , 1 ) ) /ROUND(  a.max_value/1024.0 , 1 ) *100.0) , 0 ) AS lpsis2_Mem_Use
   FROM lpsis2.apm_db_os_stat_10min a, lpsis2.apm_db_os_stat_10min b, ora_db_os_name c
  WHERE a.db_id = c.db_id
    AND a.os_id = c.os_id
    and a.partition_key  = b.partition_key
    AND c.os_id = 5
    and a.time between date_trunc('month', to_date($__timeFrom(),'YYYY-MM-DDTHH24:MI:SS')) - interval '0 months' and date_trunc('month', to_date($__timeTo(),'YYYY-MM-DDTHH24:MI:SS')) + interval '1 months' 
    and a.time = b.time
    and a.db_id = b.db_id
    and b.os_id = 4
group by 1
order by 1
;

SELECT DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, RGST_DTM) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0) AS time
     , MAX(cpuUse) AS lpctr1_CPU_Use
   from [dbo].[TB_Svr_Rsrc_Chk_L]
  where 1=1
    and hostname = 'lpbatap01'
    AND collectdt BETWEEN  REPLACE(SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,10),'-','') AND  REPLACE(SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR,DATEADD(MONTH,1,CONVERT(DATETIME, $__timeTo()))-1, 112),1,10),'-','')
group by DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, RGST_DTM) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0)
order by time

SELECT DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, RGST_DTM) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0) AS time
     , MAX(cpuUse) AS lpctr2_CPU_Use
   from [dbo].[TB_Svr_Rsrc_Chk_L]
  where 1=1
    and hostname = 'lpbatap02'
    AND collectdt BETWEEN  REPLACE(SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,10),'-','') AND  REPLACE(SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR,DATEADD(MONTH,1,CONVERT(DATETIME, $__timeTo()))-1, 112),1,10),'-','')
group by DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, RGST_DTM) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0)
order by time

SELECT DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, RGST_DTM) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0) AS time
     , MAX(memUse) AS lpctr1_Mem_Use
   from [dbo].[TB_Svr_Rsrc_Chk_L]
  where 1=1
    and hostname = 'lpbatap01'
    AND collectdt BETWEEN  REPLACE(SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,10),'-','') AND  REPLACE(SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR,DATEADD(MONTH,1,CONVERT(DATETIME, $__timeTo()))-1, 112),1,10),'-','')
group by DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, RGST_DTM) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0)
order by 1

SELECT DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, RGST_DTM) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0) AS time
     , MAX(memUse) lpctr2_Mem_Use
   from [dbo].[TB_Svr_Rsrc_Chk_L]
  where 1=1
    and hostname = 'lpbatap02'
    AND collectdt BETWEEN  REPLACE(SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,10),'-','') AND  REPLACE(SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR,DATEADD(MONTH,1,CONVERT(DATETIME, $__timeTo()))-1, 112),1,10),'-','')
group by DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, RGST_DTM) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0)
order by 1

list.definition:
SELECT CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) < 1*60*24 THEN 1
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN  1*60*24 AND   2*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 2  *60*24 THEN 30
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN  2*60*24 AND  30*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 30 *60*24 THEN 60
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN 30*60*24 AND 365*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 365*60*24 THEN 180
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) >= 365*60*24 THEN 720
        END
list.name: TimeRangeGroup
list.query:
SELECT CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) < 1*60*24 THEN 1
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN  1*60*24 AND   2*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 2  *60*24 THEN 30
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN  2*60*24 AND  30*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 30 *60*24 THEN 60
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN 30*60*24 AND 365*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 365*60*24 THEN 180
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) >= 365*60*24 THEN 720
        END
